description.unified: Attack frontal enemies in a circular range of self 2 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and knocking them down for [1.5 sec->2.5 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks enemeis in a wider range to deal ??? P.DMG and knock them down for [2 sec->3.5 sec].

Attacks the target 3 times, and then charges behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by [24%->25%] for [5 sec->10 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks the target 3 times, charging behind it to deal ??? P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by 25% for 10 sec. [600->500] additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill.

Deals ??? P.DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [1 sec->3 sec]. Additionally, for [10 sec->20 sec], increases self's ATK by ???, ATK Spd by [(added) 250], All Dodge Chance by [(added) 250], and DMG of normal attacks by [100%->125%] while gaining immunity to CC. This effect is irremovable.

Increases own All DEF by ??? and All Dodge Chance by [Magic Evasion 360->200]. When equipped with The Holly Sword, Aea, receives the blessing of the goddess that increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [20%->30%] and reduces DMG taken from Non-Hero enemies by [20%->30%].

dark.unified: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.
On hit, [increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 24% for 5 sec -> Reduces the target's P.DEF by 30% for 10 sec].

light.unified: [Reduces DMG taken by 20% -> Physical Evasion increases by 600] while in [Proxy of God].

dark.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [(added) 1] and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [34%->100%] for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: Increases Dodge Chance by [(added) 150] and recovers [(added) 5% of Max HP] upon dodging. This effect only activates once every [(added) 3 sec]. [ATK increase amount increases by 50% -> (removed) ATK increase amount increases by 50%].

dark.unified: Reduces DMG received from Heroes by [6% of Max HP restored every 3 sec on evasion -> 15%].

description.unified: [Judgement Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [5->10] times and is irremovable.
[Proxy of God] Additionally, Dodge Rate is increased by 250, and ATK Spd is increased by {0} for the duration of skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases DEF Boost by 50%, and DMG dealt to bosses by {0}%.

dark.unified: Upon attacking, deals [60%->80%] additional P.DMG of ATK. This effect is applied as [120%->160%] to Non-Hero enemies and has 0.5 sec Cooldown.

description.unified: Each attack has a 35% chance to dealing {0}% of ATK as P.DMG. Has 0.5 sec Cooldown.
